velocity_vs_rigour_quote: Own the quality, availability, and trustworthiness of data — through quality checks and data contracts
velocity_vs_rigour_reasoning: No velocity signals present; multiple rigour signals including data contracts, quality checks, and ownership of trustworthiness.
domain_risk_quote: Design solutions for KPIs and business metrics
domain_risk_reasoning: JD focuses on business metrics and data products without explicit regulatory, financial reporting, or compliance language.
collaboration_width_teams: Engage with analysts and scientists to understand problems and translate them into data solutions; Work with developers on data creation aligned with business logic
data_team_maturity_quote: Provide expertise and collaborate with stakeholders to develop new data products within a Data Mesh environment
data_team_maturity_reasoning: Data Mesh architecture indicates an established, sophisticated data function, while the emphasis on actively developing new products and building self-service capabilities suggests they remain in a growth/scaling phase.
jd_authorship_quote: Own the quality, availability, and trustworthiness of data — through quality checks and data contracts
jd_authorship_reasoning: Technical specificity (data contracts, data mesh architecture, self-service capabilities) indicates hiring manager input, but generic collaboration language and boilerplate action verbs suggest significant recruiter contribution.
stakeholder_orientation_quote: Build an environment where self-service capabilities are available for analysts and data consumers
stakeholder_orientation_reasoning: The role serves the data platform itself and internal data consumers (analysts, scientists, developers), not external commercial, product, or finance functions.
autonomy_level_quote: Provide expertise and collaborate with stakeholders to develop new data products within a Data Mesh environment
autonomy_level_reasoning: Combines strategic development and ownership of data products with collaborative execution supporting analysts and scientists in a shared environment.
greenfield_vs_fix_quote: develop new data products within a Data Mesh environment
ai_role_quote: Design solutions for KPIs and business metrics
ai_role_reasoning: No AI signals present; role focuses on standard data engineering and product development without AI tools, infrastructure, or AI-first practices.
testing_framing_quote: Own the quality, availability, and trustworthiness of data — through quality checks and data contracts
testing_framing_reasoning: Explicit ownership responsibility verb 'own' paired with quality checks and data contracts indicates candidate owns quality practice.
loss_aversion_framing_quote: Own the quality, availability, and trustworthiness of data
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Operational reliability concerns (quality, availability, trustworthiness) emphasized without explicit regulatory or compliance dominance.
